nasb.text: But all this has taken place to fulfill the Scriptures of the prophets.” Then all the disciples left Him and fled.

esv.text: But all this has taken place that the Scriptures of the prophets might be fulfilled.”  Then all the disciples left him and fled.

cnv.text: 但這整件事的發生，是要應驗先知書上的話。”那時，門徒都離開他逃跑了。

ccb.text: 不过这一切事的发生，是要应验先知书上的话。”那时，门徒都丢下祂逃走了。

csbs.text: 不过这整个事的发生，是为要应验先知书的那些经文。”这时候，所有的门徒都离开他，逃跑了。
